items.name: Combat Pool
items.detail: max(5, History+6) OR Agility x 2 + History + 3
items.notes: Triple-carried: values_master.yaml:212 (references nonexistent params/combat.md), values_master.yaml:1150, AND params/core.md:4 header comment cite PP-247 (stale). Canonical per numeric_bounds_report: params/core.md:161 + module_contracts.yaml:810 + combat_config.gd agree on max(5, History+6).

items.name: Mending Stability (MS)
items.detail: range 0-100; floor 0 (Rupture); ceiling 100; starts 60 (TTRPG), 72 (BG). Thresholds: 0/10/20/40/50/60/72 verified legitimate.
items.notes: RENAMED ED-731. All thresholds verified legitimate per numeric_bounds_report 2026-04-26. No formula governs MS drift; thresholds hand-authored.

items.name: Church Influence (CI)
items.detail: range 0-100 (no freeze). Starting value 28 per P-32. Thresholds: 50 (Restoration Assert), 55 (emergent), 60 (Mass Seizure).
items.notes: COLLISION PENDING: CI = Church Influence (ci_political) AND Crown Index (derived_stats_v30). Recorded name_collision_database.yaml:459 awaiting Jordan ruling.

items.name: Institutional Pressure (IP)
items.notes: COLLISION PENDING: IP = Institutional Pressure (clock) AND Imperial Pressure (derived_stats). FORMULA MISSING: no explicit advancement rule found.

items.name: Piety Track (PT)
items.notes: COLLISION PENDING: PT = Piety Track AND Piety Territory (derived_stats). Mechanical_terms_index line 264 flags old diagnostic used wrong range (0-10, should be 0-5).

items.name: Coherence
items.detail: Personal: 0-10 (full to fractured). Cosmological: 4 TS-gated bands (Stirring 30-49, Attuned 50-69, Sensitive 70-89, Resonant 90-100). Thresholds: 10/<=4/0.
items.notes: INTENTIONAL cross-silo per mechanical_terms_index:2 (same concept at three scales). Multiple thresholds verified legitimate per numeric_bounds_report 2026-04-26.

items.name: Mandate (faction stat)
items.detail: range 1-7 (floor normally 1, can collapse 0). Thresholds: 0=loss-control, 4=trigger. Ceiling 7 hard.
aliases_or_variants: Mandate Pool (deprecated, should be Political Pool)
items.notes: COLLISION (LOW): Mandate Pool uses stat noun. Collision_registry recommends Political Pool (already canonical in ci_political_v30:3.4,7.2). Unresolved.

items.name: Conviction Scar
items.detail: Per-Conviction accumulator. Crisis at 3+ Scars on ANY SINGLE Conviction (not aggregate). Multi-primary NPCs scar each independently.
items.notes: CLARIFIED PP-718 (2026-05-10): per-Conviction accumulation (not aggregate). Crisis table updated: Autonomy->Self-Other-orientation. Migration preserves Scar counts.

coverage_notes: SCOPE SWEPT: F-INDEX family (secondary indices + validators) in depth. FILES READ COMPLETE: mechanical_terms_index.md (1743 lines, sampled first 645 + overview), numeric_bounds_report.yaml (full 1635), propagation_map.md (full 161), silo_overlap_matrix.yaml (full 202), name_collision_database.yaml (full 506), collision_registry.yaml (full 60), test_descriptor_registry.py (full 50), ci_names_check.py (200+ lines). SKIPPED/LIMITS: (1) Full cross-validation of mechanical_terms_index vs all 80 source docs (would exceed token budget; spot-checked params/ + designs/scene/ only). (2) descriptor_registry.yaml itself (infrastructure layer, not F-INDEX scope). (3) ci_naming_check.py hard gate (focus was report gate + collision DB). (4) 8 archived propagation entries (out of scope). CARDINAL RULES APPLIED: (a) every claim has file:line evidence; (b) build-state never verdict; (c) KNOWN-TRACKED findings cite ED id; (d) no new criteria (all findings name shape-divergence or enforcement-gap per armature guardrails). HONEST GAPS: mechanical_terms_index overlap verdicts accepted as-is (did not verify each per-entry); numeric_bounds_report thresholds marked legitimate by tool's 2026-04-26 review (accepted KNOWN-TRACKED).
